name: 🥀🩸 || Dandy’s Block ⇶ Community "Therapy"
description:
Officer Rodger Decides To “Help Everyone In This Crazy Shithole Out”… By Bringing Everyone into a Group Therapy Session.

CLARIFYING AGAIN, cuz I’m seeing sum comments;

DANDYS BLOCK IS A DANDYS WORLD ALTERNATE UNIVERSE. YES, THE ‘CORNY’ ROBLOX GAME. THEY ARE SET TO BE IN THE HOOD, THEY ARE GOING TO SAY AND DO THINGS THAT MAY BE DISTASTEFUL TO SOME INDIVIDUALS. IF YOU NEED CONTEXT ON CHARACTERS AND OR MORE LORE, GO CHECK OUT THE ORIGINAL CONTENT AS STATED BELOW

👇👇👇

Credits to @G1are/B1ank on TikTok for this fire ass AU. ONCE AGAIN, IF you need the character’s designs, please go to G1are’s TikTok page, they have all of their designs on there + Lore on some of them as well.

ONCE AGAINNNNNN, BECAUSE IVE SEEN PEOPLE WHO DONT READY, THIS IS A DANDYS WORLD AU. I REPEAT, THIS IS A DANDYS WORLD AU. THE ROBLOX GAME THAT EVERYONE HATES BUT HAS NEVER PLAYED AT ALL.

You have been warned. Do not comment some corny bullshit like ‘Dandys world bad’ I DONT GAF.

THANK YOU EVERYONE FOR ALL THE LOVE ON THIS!! Makes me happy to see people enjoying things I make. Makes my day replying to cool ppl ^u^

This was actually a request by a friend, he had an intro message for it but didn’t wanna go through the hassle of analyzing every character n’ all that stuff so he just gave it to me and told me to do smth with it. He’s also on here and has a cool HTF bot, so go check that out fr.

(Love you, @Rickerby, anything for my wonderful bbg and his beautiful ideas)

Uhm… Okay, so, I DIDN’T add Too-Too into this bot. No creepos gonna be finding work-arounds and messing with that child, I don’t fuck with that weird shit. If you do, press that power off button on whatever bullshit you on and walk down to the nearest police station and turn yourself in for me before I personally deck you.

Uhm… Man, there’s not a lot to go off of with this AU, so I had to be creative with it. I dunno. I feel like I did pretty good with figuring out personalities of the characters who haven’t been in one of the creator’s comics by just their intro stances alone combined with their existing regular versions, as well as a LOT of fan things. This bot is 80% headcanons 😭

Everyone actually isn’t in this… It’d probably start confusing the AI if I included everyone bc there’s like 20 of these mfs 😭. But since I DID add a good few, it’s probably still gonna be confused. So just correct it if it gets some bullshit wrong, easy as that.

As of now, Stro, Silent & Deadly, Shanks, Double D, Spro & Cozz, the Scrap siblings, Officer Rodger (obviously), Detective Vee, Pop and Shakes are in here. What a mouthful.

[Lil Updat
creator: Luciklive
